title: Special Topic in Human/Environment Interactions

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS.

outline: Issues and themes in contemporary aspects of the Human/Environmental interface will be covered, profiling core debates in a specialist field of human or environmental geography. At NQF 9 level there is a strong emphasis on the development of analytical skills, and students are expected to apply these skills in the context of an appropriate theory to a case study of their own specialist field.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
